what: Pos 12.18, silo expertise page /défense-pénale/trafic-de-stupéfiant (not /post/). SERP saturated with COMPETITOR LAW FIRMS (Gabeaud, Paganelli, Zerbib, DCH) — pure commercial intent, zero institutional sources. Tests silo treatment + recognition that the page must compete on lawyer expertise differentiation, not on definitional content.

asserts.why: Top 5 SERP positions all held by lawyer firms — the page faces commercial-intent SERP, not informational. A diagnosis that misses this proposes content/definitional fixes when the real lever is positioning differentiation.
Naming at least one lawyer-competitor anchors the snippet diagnosis in real differentiation work — generic 'meilleur snippet' advice without competitive context is useless.
Must point at a surface-level lever (title/meta/angle) — page is silo expertise so structural changes are not the right action vs snippet rewrite.
Commercial intent + 81s dwell + 0 conversion = CTA placement is the funnel lever — diagnosis must propose CTA work.
